data.chapter_title_en: Invocation for a family who invites you to break your fast with them
data.arabic_text: ((أَفْطَرَ عِنْدَكُمُ الصَّائِمُونَ، وَأَكَلَ طَعَامَكُمُ الْأَبْرَارُ، وَصَلَّتْ عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَلاَئِكَةُ)).
data.english_text: (May the fasting break their fast in your home, and may the dutiful and pious eat your food, and may the angles send prayers upon you.)
